sn32.1:1.1: At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, I will teach you about the devas of the cloud-dwelling order. Listen to that …
sn32.1:1.2: "And what, bhikkhus, are the devas of the cloud-dwelling order?[n.291] Spk: These are devas living in space who have arisen in the company of the devas called the cloud dwellers. There are, bhikkhus, cool-cloud devas, warm-cloud devas, storm-cloud devas, wind-cloud devas, and rain-cloud devas.
sn32.1:1.3: "These, bhikkhus, are called the devas of the cloud-dwelling order."
